deterministic_validators.name: unsupported_claim_checker
deterministic_validators.rule: Every clinical assertion in evidenceMappings, submissionPacket, and appealPacket must have a citation, source span, or completed clinician task.

deterministic_validators.name: human_decision_ledger_validator
deterministic_validators.rule: All human-gated claims and appeal drafts require completed Action Center task refs before audit_ready.

deterministic_validators.name: care_handoff_completion_validator
deterministic_validators.rule: Audit is blocked if pharmacyHandoff.status is failed or pending after payer approval.

deterministic_validators.name: synthetic_data_guard
deterministic_validators.rule: Flag data that lacks synthetic fixture refs or contains real-world contact/credential/PHI-like values.
